name: EKS cluster control plane logging not fully enabled
description: EKS control plane logging is not enabled for all log types (api, audit, authenticator, controllerManager, scheduler). Without complete logging, security-relevant events such as API calls, authentication attempts, and control-plane operations are invisible.
remediation: Enable all control plane log types: API server, audit, authenticator, controller manager, and scheduler. Send logs to CloudWatch Logs and configure metric filters and alarms on audit log anomalies.
